requirement_topic.en: Connector Redesign — IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口转换——IEC 62196 Type 2 与 CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口轉換——IEC 62196 Type 2 與 CCS2

summary.en: Iceland is a European-market EV context, so conductive charging hardware typically aligns to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC where project procurement and fleet requirements call for it. Connector alignment is an interoperability and tender requirement and is handled separately from the core electrical safety test result.
summary.zh: 冰岛属于欧洲市场应用场景，交流充电多采用 IEC 62196 Type 2，直流快充在项目采购或车队要求下采用 CCS2。接口兼容性是互通与招标要求的一部分，应与核心电气安全检测结果分开处理。
summary.zht: 冰島屬於歐洲市場應用場景，交流充電多採用 IEC 62196 Type 2，直流快充在項目採購或車隊要求下採用 CCS2。接口相容性是互通與招標要求的一部分，應與核心電氣安全測試結果分開處理。

standards_or_laws: Project, fleet, operator, or procurement connector requirements

summary.en: China often uses GB/T 20234.2 and GB/T 20234.3 hardware and signaling for AC/DC connectors. These provide useful starting data but cannot be claimed as Type 2 or CCS2 compliance without hardware, cable, communication, and safety rebuild.
summary.zh: 中国常见采用 GB/T 20234.2 和 GB/T 20234.3 来定义 AC/DC 接口与信号。它们可作为起始数据，但不能在未完成硬件、线缆、通信和安全重建前宣称为 Type 2 或 CCS2 合规。
summary.zht: 中國常見採用 GB/T 20234.2 和 GB/T 20234.3 來定義 AC/DC 接口與訊號。它們可作為起始資料，但不能在未完成硬體、電纜、通信和安全重建前聲稱為 Type 2 或 CCS2 合規。

gap.en: GB/T-only charger hardware needs connector and protocol migration for Iceland-facing deployment: coupler type selection, cable thermal rating, locking circuit, proximity and control pilot logic, DC communication if CCS2 is used, labels, and test evidence after migration.
gap.zh: 仅按 GB/T 的充电桩硬件在面向冰岛部署前需要接口与协议迁移：耦合器类型选择、电缆热额定、锁定回路、接近与控制导引逻辑、CCS2 场景下的直流通信、标签与改造后的复测。
gap.zht: 僅按 GB/T 的充電樁硬體在面向冰島部署前需要接口與協定遷移：耦合器型號選擇、電纜熱額定、鎖定回路、接近與控制導引邏輯、CCS2 場景下的直流通信、標籤與改造後復測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where deployment contracts, charging fleet, or operator policy requires Type 2 / CCS2 compatibility; otherwise treated as interoperability expectation
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 evidence is not direct Type 2 or CCS2 conformance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not describe a GB/T-only connector package as Iceland Type 2 or CCS2 ready. Rebuild interface hardware, labeling, and safety documentation for the targeted Iceland deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将仅 GB/T 的接口包视为已适配冰岛 Type 2 或 CCS2。应按目标部署重新构建接口硬件、标签和安全文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將僅 GB/T 的接口包視為已符合冰島 Type 2 或 CCS2。應按目標部署重建接口硬體、標籤與安全文件。
